channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Rising GLP-1 Use Sparks Worry Over Muscle Loss
item.description: Incretin mimetic therapy for obesity may reduce muscle mass and bone density, but its impact on physical function and fracture risk remains unclear.

item.title: Financial Strain May Accelerate Brain Aging, Study Suggests
item.description: Decades of UK data indicate chronic financial hardship, not temporary setbacks, drives poorer midlife cognition and brain shrinkage. Press Association

item.title: Doctors Who Ignore AI Risk Falling Behind [PODCAST]
item.description: Subscribe to The Podcast by KevinMD. Watch on YouTube. Catch up on old episodes! When your hospital decides how to use AI, will you be in the room or ...

item.title: Compound Found That May Help Preserve Muscle Strength With Age
item.description: Skeletal muscle is among the first tissues to decline with age, leading to weakness, scarring, fat accumulation, and loss of function.
